__meta.purpose: RFP v0.1 fixtures — 6 scenario paths for verifyResolverFreshness + consumer quorum

normal_valid.__scenario: P1 normal path — all 8 invariants pass
normal_valid.__note: asOfTime + signature must be computed at test runtime; see test helper buildValidRfp

freshness_stale.__scenario: P2 I_asof_window fails — proof has expired (asOfTime falls outside the freshnessWindow)
freshness_stale.__note: asOfTime must be older than now - freshnessWindow; signature still valid over stale 5-field payload

watermark_regress.__scenario: P3 I_ver fails — rfpVersion is not 1.0.0 (version-rollback attack simulation)
watermark_regress.__note: verifyResolverFreshness must throw RFP_VERSION_UNSUPPORTED before reaching I_sig

signature_invalid.__scenario: P4 I_sig fails — Ed25519 signature mismatch (asOfTime tampered without re-signing)
signature_invalid.__note: signature is an 87-char base64url string that will NOT verify against any real payload; length matches but content is wrong

resolver_unknown.__scenario: P5 publicKeyResolver pre-check for I_sig fails — resolver DID has no public key record (resolvePublicKey returns null)
resolver_unknown.__note: resolverDid must not be registered in the test publicKeyResolver; returns null → RFP_RESOLVER_UNREACHABLE (HTTP 503; dependency-unavailable semantics)

quorum_below_threshold.__scenario: P6 verifyQuorumFreshness fails — the number of nodes with an available fresh proof is below quorumThreshold

resolverNodes.__note: node C: fresh proof available but only 1/3 < quorumThreshold=2

resolver_public_keys.__note: Test-time resolver DID → public key registry (in-memory; not DB-persisted)

did:agent:resolver-fixture-001.__format: Ed25519 public key hex (32 bytes = 64 hex chars)
did:agent:resolver-fixture-001.__note: Generated per-test-run via generateKeyPair; stored here for fixture schema documentation only
